description: Replace hard-coded setTimeout sleeps with polling helpers in server/extension-focused E2E tests. These sleeps are a primary source of flakiness — under CI load, a 2-3 second sleep may not be long enough for the operation to complete. Polling for the expected condition is both faster and more reliable. After this lands, the affected tests use deterministic waits instead of wall-clock sleeps.

userStories.title: Replace sleeps in notify-readiness-changed, multi-connection, and auth-bootstrap tests
userStories.description: Replace 3 hard-coded sleeps with polling: (1) notify-readiness-changed.e2e.ts:34 sleeps 2s after notifyReadinessChanged — poll health instead, (2) multi-connection.e2e.ts:67 sleeps 3s to verify connections aren't evicted — poll health twice, (3) auth-bootstrap.e2e.ts:56 sleeps 3s waiting for extension to fail auth — poll health for extensionConnected=false.
acceptanceCriteria: notify-readiness-changed.e2e.ts has no setTimeout sleep at line 34; uses mcpServer.waitForHealth or expect.poll to verify tabState is 'ready'
multi-connection.e2e.ts has no 3-second sleep at line 67; uses two sequential health polls with a 1-second gap to verify connections persist
auth-bootstrap.e2e.ts has no 3-second sleep at line 56; uses server.waitForHealth(h => h.extensionConnected === false) or expect.poll

userStories.title: Replace sleeps in iife-injection, security, and permissions tests
userStories.description: Replace 3 hard-coded sleeps: (1) iife-injection.e2e.ts:778 sleeps 3s after sync.full — poll for log instead, (2) security.e2e.ts:318 sleeps 2s for dispatch slot registration — poll for active dispatch count, (3) permissions.e2e.ts:1149 sleeps 1s for dispatch to reach extension — poll for dispatch log.
acceptanceCriteria: iife-injection.e2e.ts has no 3-second sleep at line 778; uses waitForLog or similar polling
security.e2e.ts has no 2-second sleep at line 318; uses polling for active dispatch state
permissions.e2e.ts has no 1-second sleep at line 1149; uses polling to confirm dispatch is in-flight

userStories.title: Fix reload-coalescing timing and replace sleep in stress-config-reload
userStories.description: Replace timing-dependent sleeps in reload-coalescing.e2e.ts and stress-config-reload.e2e.ts. The coalescing test uses 700ms to 'exit the 500ms window' and 1500ms for 'discovery to finish' — both unreliable under CI load. Replace with log-based polling where possible and increase timing margins where polling isn't feasible.
acceptanceCriteria: reload-coalescing.e2e.ts:174 uses waitForLog for 'Plugin discovery complete' instead of 1500ms sleep
reload-coalescing.e2e.ts:189 uses waitForLog for 'Plugin discovery complete' instead of 1500ms sleep
reload-coalescing.e2e.ts:105 and :180 use at least 1000ms margin (up from 700ms) to exit the coalescing window
stress-config-reload.e2e.ts:89 uses waitForLog or waitForToolList instead of 2000ms sleep
